MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-18-2015 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT MARY LEACH'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. PLAINTIFF TO APPEAR AT THE LAW OFFICES OF BURESH, KAPLAN, FELLER & CHANG FEBRUARY 23, 2015 AT 9:00 A.M. FOR HIS DEPOSITION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TO PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,696.20 NO LATER THAN 9:00 MARCH 2, 2015. CHECK TO BE MADE PAYABLE TO MARY LEACH AND THEIR ATTORNEYS OF RECORD, BURESH, KAPLAN, FELLER & CHANG. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM, KATHERINE GALLO, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MARY LEACH's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is Granted. The court finds that no opposition was filed. Plaintiff to appear at the law offices of Buresh, Kaplan, Feller & Chang February 23, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. for his deposition. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted. Plaintiff to pay sanctions in the amount of $1,696.20 no later than 9:00 March 2, 2015. Check to be made payable to Mary Leach and their attorneys of record, Buresh, Kaplan, Feller & Chang. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro Tem, Katherine Gallo, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
